title: Epilepsy SA branch celebrates 40 years of care
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - \"Thank you, Garden Route, for helping us build not just care but belonging. Here's to the next 40!\" This sentiment captures the spirit of Epilepsy South Africa's South Cape/Karoo Branch as it proudly celebrated its 40th anniversary - four decades of dedicated service to people with epilepsy and related disabilities across the Southern Cape and Karoo.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - \"Thank you, Garden Route, for helping us build not just care but belonging. Here's to the next 40!\" This sentiment captures the spirit of Epilepsy South Africa's South Cape/Karoo Branch as it proudly celebrated its 40th anniversary - four decades of dedicated service to people with epilepsy and related disabilities across the Southern Cape and Karoo."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Founded in 1985 by Sister Sanett van der Merwe and social worker Anne Cretchley, the branch began as a small residential care initiative in the old Loeriehof Old Age Home."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Over the years, it has grown into a lifeline for individuals and families affected by neurological conditions, offering specialised care, skills development, counselling, outreach, and support throughout the region.","html":"Over the years, it has grown into a lifeline for individuals and families affected by neurological conditions, offering specialised care, skills development, counselling, outreach, and support throughout the region."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The branch hosted a stylish cheese and wine evening at The Piazza, Knysna Mall, to commemorate the milestone alongside its annual general meeting.","html":"The branch hosted a stylish cheese and wine evening at The Piazza, Knysna Mall, to commemorate the milestone alongside its annual general meeting."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Guests included local donors, partner organisations, churches, municipal representatives, and clients from the Carpentry Workshop. Live jazz by Marlene Boyce and Waldi van Wyk added to the celebratory atmosphere."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With services reaching communities from Knysna and Plettenberg Bay to George, Oudtshoorn, and into the Greater Karoo, the branch continues to embody its founding values: care, dignity, and empowerment.","html":"With services reaching communities from Knysna and Plettenberg Bay to George, Oudtshoorn, and into the Greater Karoo, the branch continues to embody its founding values: care, dignity, and empowerment."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"We have survived and thrived because people choose to walk beside us,\" says Ashleigh Smith, fundraiser and PR officer. \"This is more than a facility - it's a home.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"As the branch steps into its next chapter, there are many ways you can get involved:","html":"As the branch steps into its next chapter, there are many ways you can get involved:"},{"type":"list","items":["Volunteer your time or skills","Donate or become a monthly supporter","Offer professional services or goods in kind","Host a fundraising or awareness event","Champion epilepsy awareness and inclusion in workplaces or schools","For more information or to get involved, contact Smith via email at [email protected] or phone her on 044 382 2155."],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Epilepsy SA South Cape/Karoo branch hosted a stylish cheese-and-wine evening at The Piazza, Knysna Mall, to commemorate the milestone alongside its AGM.","html":"Epilepsy SA South Cape/Karoo branch hosted a stylish cheese-and-wine evening at The Piazza, Knysna Mall, to commemorate the milestone alongside its AGM."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
